message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 40
  BoxPadding 20
  MessageAlign left
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBorderThickness 1
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6E6
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFF9C4
  NoteBorderColor #888888
  GroupBorderColor #000000
  GroupHeaderBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  GroupBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ArrowColor #000000
}

title

participant "Line of Business" as LOB
participant "ESB" as ESB

box "Compliance IT" #90EE90
  participant "Scoring" as Scoring
  participant "Recertification" as Recert
end box

group "Customer On-Boarding: Open a New Account"
  LOB -> ESB : UpdatePartyKYC\nincludeScore=true
  alt "Recertification completed"
    LOB -> ESB : UpdatePartyKYC\nincludeScore=true\nrecertificationStatus=completed\nactor=<userid>\nreason=<one of client-initiated trigger codes>
  end
end

ESB -> Scoring : 1 score

note over ESB,Scoring
Schedule a new recertification and calculate its due date
OR retrieve due date of an existing recertification if
one has been previously scheduled and not yet
completed or cancelled
end note

Scoring -> Recert : 2 recertify
activate Recert
Recert -> Recert : 3 evaluate rules

group "Recertification"
  alt "Recertification is Needed"
    group "Establish a Recertification"
      Recert -> Recert : 4 schedule a new recertification
      alt "Existing Recertification"
        Recert -> Recert : 5 retrieve a previously\nscheduled recertification\nthat hasn't been completed or cancelled
      end
    end

    alt "Complete a Recertification"
      Recert -> Recert : 6 complete an established recertification
      note right of Recert
      Immediately complete the
      recertification if the LOB
      told us it was already done
      end note
    end

    Recert --> Scoring : 7 recertification details
    note left of Scoring
    Due date, status, recert id
    end note

    Scoring --> LOB : 8 score + recertification
  end

  alt "Recertification is Not Needed"
    Recert --> Scoring : 9 no recertification
    Scoring --> LOB : 10 score
  end
end

deactivate Recert
@enduml
```
